title: v0.3 TS-8 — Plugin Manifest & Distribution
text:
<content>
plugin.json updates: name=cohrence (matches package.json; vowel-drop). version=0.3.0 at GA cut; pre-GA 0.3.0-pre.N. min_claude_code_version=2.0.0 (carry; verify via DD-090 host probe at M0). slashCommands gains 4 entries (export-metrics, ignore-split, de-annotate, scope-debug). hooks unchanged from v0.2 (6 hooks).
Slim tarball (DD-095 amended via DD-118): package.json#files = ['dist','plugin.json','prompts/v2']. Drops bare 'prompts' glob (would include prompts/v1). M-LEGACY-1 ship-time gate asserts npm pack --dry-run excludes prompts/v1/. Tarball includes: dist/ (compiled JS+types), plugin.json, prompts/v2/, src/state/schemas/ via dist/state/schemas/, bin/ statusline scripts. 10 MB cap (NFR-PERF-8) via pack:size.
Distribution channels: Anthropic plugin registry (canonical, DD-093) — listing raised; v0.3.0 tag on master, tarball matches npm pack output (FR-MARKETPLACE-1). GitHub release tarball — git tag v0.3.0; release notes include SHA256 (FR-MARKETPLACE-4). npm registry (optional, squat-prevention) — publish 0.0.0-placeholder stub on cohrence name; not maintained as real distribution (DD-117 + DD-118).
Release pipeline: scripts/release-ga.mjs (existing v0.2). v0.3 amendments drop v0.2-alpha-tag step (no alpha period per DD-118), adds M-LEGACY-1 + M-ARCH-1 + M-PRIVACY-1 static-analysis gate runs before tagging. Telemetry hash of corpus calibration result (release-artifacts/v0.3-corpus-calibration-<ts>.json) attached to GitHub release.
Audit follow-up 2026-05-10 — First-run telemetry consent (FR-MARKETPLACE-5, DD-115) G4 fill:
Trigger: first SessionStart after install when version.json being created (refuseLegacy.ts 'fresh install' branch). Before any telemetry emission.
Two-tier consent: (1) 'Local telemetry collection — hashed events written only to .claude/coherence/metrics.jsonl on this machine. Default: yes (opt-out)?' (2) 'Upload telemetry — you initiate /coherence:export-metrics manually; nothing leaves your machine without your action. Default: no (opt-in)?'.
Persistence: choices to .claude/coherence/config.json under {telemetry: {local_collection, upload_consent, recorded_at: ISO8601, plugin_version: '0.3.0'}}. v0.2 config.schema.json gets telemetry object additive at v0.3.
Re-prompt rules: SessionStart re-prompts if telemetry.recorded_at absent. Honour recorded choice silently otherwise. Major-version bumps re-prompt explicitly per DD-118 no migration.
Statusline + status surface: /coherence:status gains 'Telemetry: local=on/off, upload=on/off' line. Toggling = manual edit of config.json (intentional friction; future /coherence:telemetry can wrap).
Failure modes: consent prompt errors (non-interactive shell) → default local-collection ON, upload OFF, recorded_at set, non_interactive_default:true flag persisted so later interactive session re-prompts. M-PRIVACY-1 ensures upload-OFF honoured by export command (checks upload_consent before printing curl).
Audit follow-up round 2 — C5 tarball schema inclusion: v0.2 imports schemas as JSON modules with resolveJsonModule:true; tsc copies into dist/state/schemas/. files:['dist',...] picks up transitively. No 'tsc resourceModuleSpecifier copy' needed. Verification at M0: tests/ship/tarball-shape.test.ts also asserts dist/state/schemas/ non-empty post-build.
C6 firstRun.ts ownership: src/state/refuseLegacy.ts (M0) is SessionStart entrypoint — legacy → refuse, fresh-install → call firstRun.runFreshInstall(), current-v3 → proceed. src/state/firstRun.ts is helper module created in M3 (.gitignore patcher) and extended in M4 (consent prompt). M0 ships refuseLegacy.ts calling stub firstRun.runFreshInstall() that just writes version sentinel; M3/M4 layer responsibilities. Boundary: refuseLegacy.ts owns version.json read+refusal; firstRun.ts owns ALL fresh-install side effects (sentinel write, .gitignore patch, consent prompt). One module per concern, ordered call sequence inside runFreshInstall().
</content>
